Package neqsim.statistics.parameterfitting

Class ExperimentalDataReader.CsvOptions

java.lang.Object
neqsim.statistics.parameterfitting.ExperimentalDataReader.CsvOptions
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
ExperimentalDataReader
public static class ExperimentalDataReader.CsvOptions extends Object implements Serializable
CSV mapping options for experimental data loading.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa

    Creates empty options for serialization frameworks.

  • Constructor Details

    • CsvOptions

      public CsvOptions()
      Creates empty options for serialization frameworks.

    • CsvOptions

      public CsvOptions(String name, String responseName, String responseUnit, String[] dependentVariableNames, String[] dependentVariableUnits)
      Creates CSV options from data-set metadata.
      Parameters:
      name - data set name
      responseName - response name
      responseUnit - response unit
      dependentVariableNames - independent variable names
      dependentVariableUnits - independent variable target units
